app.name: FloraSmart
app.tagline: Empowering gardeners and florists with AI-driven plant care and ecological garden planning.

landing.featuresSubtitle: Our unified platform is tailored for customers, professional florists, garden planners, and store managers.
landing.feature1Text: Analyze your environment's sunlight, watering capacities, and safety profile to receive customized, toxicity-vetted plant matches.
landing.feature2Text: Select bouquets and input vase sizes. Our system calculates structural fits and matching arrangements to keep flowers fresh.
landing.feature3Text: Plan your landscaping layouts interactively. Map coordinates, track planting records, and monitor growth metrics in real-time.
landing.contrastTitle: Designed for Both Enthusiasts and Experts
landing.contrastText: Whether you are looking to purchase your first houseplant, build custom floral displays for events, manage physical inventory in greenhouses, or track delivery vehicles out on the road, FloraSmart provides dedicated dashboard workspaces for every role.
landing.securityText: All role permissions are governed by role-based access controls (RBAC) and monitored through real-time security audit trails.
landing.newsletterTitle: Get Botanical Insights in Your Inbox
landing.newsletterSubtitle: Subscribe to receive weekly care sheets, early access florist drops, and intelligence updates on plant health.
landing.subscribeSuccess: Success! You have been subscribed to our mailing list.
